nodes.context: Prominent Pacific gang in New Zealand, founded in the 1950s by Samoans, involved in drug dealing and violence.
New Zealand gang involved in a large methamphetamine ring with the King Cobras in 2003.
Allied gang listed in the King Cobras infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: In 2003, members of the King Cobras ran a large methamphetamine ring along with the Head Hunters in one of Aucklands biggest drug cases.
edges.context: King Cobras and Head Hunters cooperated in a large methamphetamine ring in 2003.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bloods , Crips , Black Power , Central Auckland street gangs
edges.context: King Cobras are allied with Bloods according to the infobox.
